title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: A video discussion examining whether Google engineers use informal or intuitive coding practices, with comparisons to code generation capabilities from OpenAI Codex and Claude. The content covers current vibe coding trends at Google spanning 2024 to 2026.
